versions.version_description: The chords were changed to a lower version of the song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
N.C.
(Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)


[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Fever dream high in the quiet of the night[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
You know that I caught it (Oh yeah, you're right, I want it)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
Bad, bad boy, shiny toy with a price[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
You know that I bought it (Oh yeah, you're right, I want it)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Killing me slow, out the window[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm always waiting for you to be waiting below[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Devils roll the dice, angels roll their eyes[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
What doesn't kill me makes me want you more[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And it's new, the shape of your body[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
It's blue, the feeling I've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And it's ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
It's cool, that's what I tell 'em[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
No rules in breakable heaven[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]

With you


[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]D[/ch]
Hang your head low in the glow of the vending machine[/tab]

I'm not dying (Oh yeah, you're right, I want it)
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                                 [ch]C[/ch]
We say that we'll just screw it up in these trying times[/tab]

We're not trying (Oh yeah, you're right, I want it)


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
So cut the headlights, summer's a knife[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I'm always waiting for you just to cut to the bone[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Devils roll the dice, angels roll their eyes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
And if I bleed, you'll be the last to know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, it's new, the shape of your body[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's blue, the feeling I've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And it's ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
It's cool, that's what I tell 'em[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
No rules in breakable heaven[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]

With you


[Bridge]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm drunk in the back of the car[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
And I cried like a baby coming home from the bar (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Said, "I'm fine," but it wasn't true[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna keep secrets just to keep you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
And I snuck in through the garden gate[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Every night that summer just to seal my fate (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
And I scream, "For whatever it's worth[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
I love you, ain't that the worst thing you ever heard?"[/tab]

He looks up, grinning like a devil


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
It's new, the shape of your body[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
It's blue, the feeling I've got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And it's ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
It's cool, that's what I tell 'em[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
No rules in breakable heaven[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
But ooh, whoa oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
It's a cruel summer[/tab]

With you


[Outro]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
I'm drunk in the back of the car[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
And I cried like a baby coming home from the bar (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Said, "I'm fine," but it wasn't true[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna keep secrets just to keep you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
And I snuck in through the garden gate[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Every night that summer just to seal my fate (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
And I scream, "For whatever it's worth[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
I love you, ain't that the worst thing you ever heard?"[/tab]

(Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
